settings.description: Manage the shop details, services, scheduling, receipts, team, and notifications used across DetailFlow.

notifications.activitySubtitle: Recent Ready-notification attempts and provider status updates.

eventHints.PasswordReset: Utility template with one variable for the password reset link.

meta.title: DetailFlow | Operating system for detailing and denting shops in Saudi Arabia
meta.description: SaaS platform for managing bookings and operations at Saudi detailing and denting shops with customer tracking and WhatsApp notifications.

header.tagline: Live shop operations for detailing and denting teams

hero.eyebrow: Built for high-volume detailing and denting shops
hero.titleLineTwo: Run bookings, bays, staff, and pickup from one live board
hero.text: DetailFlow replaces notebooks and scattered WhatsApp threads with a booking link, live vehicle stages, customer tracking, receipts, and shop analytics.

workflow.title: See the entire shop day before it becomes a bottleneck
workflow.text: Every booking, vehicle, staff handoff, pickup message, and receipt sits in one operational view your team can scan in seconds.

steps.title: Capture demand cleanly
steps.body: Share one booking link on WhatsApp or Instagram and collect customer, vehicle, service, and time-slot details without back-and-forth messages.

steps.title: Move vehicles by stage
steps.body: Booked, arrived, washing, detailing, polishing, ready, and delivered become a shared flow instead of a memory test.

steps.title: Close the loop with customers
steps.body: Customers follow a private tracking link, receive ready messages, and get receipt access without repeated calls to the front desk.

saudi.title: A mobile booking and tracking flow that matches how customers actually ask for service
saudi.text: Customers book from mobile, ask through WhatsApp, and expect clear status without repeated calls. DetailFlow keeps that experience simple for both sides.
points: Arabic RTL and English interfaces designed mobile-first
Public booking page with services, prices, capacity, and available times
Private tracking link for each work order
WhatsApp-ready pickup messages and receipt links
saudi.whatsAppReadyMessage: Your vehicle is ready for pickup

features.title: The tools that make a busy shop feel controlled
features.text: DetailFlow focuses on the workflow that matters most: fill the schedule, move cars through stages, notify customers, and understand performance.

items.title: Online booking
items.body: A public page that shows services, prices, and available times based on shop capacity.

items.title: Operations Kanban
items.body: Clear stages for every vehicle with quick moves and live updates for the team.

items.title: Customer tracking
items.body: A private link for each work order showing the stage, estimated ready time, and receipt after delivery.

items.title: Ready WhatsApp
items.body: Prepared or automatic messages when the vehicle reaches the pickup-ready stage.

items.title: Performance analytics
items.body: Daily visibility into bookings, most requested services, and repeat customers.

items.title: Team and permissions
items.body: Owner, manager, and staff roles with clear plan-based limits.

pricing.title: Start with the board. Upgrade when the shop is ready for automation.
pricing.text: Simple plans: Free for an organized trial, Pro for daily operations with WhatsApp and analytics, and Business branch support coming later.

plans.name: Free
plans.note: For testing the flow with no payment card

plans.name: Pro
plans.note: For shops running daily bookings and pickup messages

plans.name: Business
plans.note: Multi-location and branch support is coming later
features: Unified operations for locations coming later

items.question: Do I need a payment card to register?
items.answer: No. You can create a workspace and start on the free plan immediately, then upgrade when you need WhatsApp or analytics.

items.question: Does DetailFlow work with our current WhatsApp?
items.answer: The team can send ready-made links through WhatsApp, and automatic notifications are available on Pro through Meta WhatsApp Business settings.

items.question: What does the customer see after booking?
items.answer: The customer gets a tracking link that shows the vehicle status, service, estimated ready time, and receipt after delivery.

items.question: Is the experience mobile-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. Booking, tracking, and the operations board are designed mobile-first, with full Arabic RTL support.

items.question: Can I run more than one branch?
items.answer: DetailFlow currently supports one branch per workspace. Multi-location and branch support is coming later.

finalCta.title: Give every vehicle a clear path through the shop
finalCta.text: Create a DetailFlow workspace, share your booking link, and start running bookings, stages, customers, and receipts from one board.

footer.tagline: Live operations for detailing and denting shops

login.errorFallback: Unable to sign in with the support account.
